objective: Resolve degraded service caused by a timeout regression.
incident_summary: Requests are backing up after a recent config deploy.
logs: INFO: Received inference request. WARN: Task aborted timeout=50ms. ERROR: request_timeout_ms exceeded before execution completed. INFO: Received inference request. WARN: Batch execution did not finish before timeout.
recent_deploy: Pushed global configuration change 10 minutes ago. request_timeout_ms was tightened aggressively to 50ms.
